    canRetry() - Method in class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy
    Check if a retry should be attempted based on circuit breaker state.
    circuitBreakerConfig(CircuitBreakerConfig) - Method in class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.resilience4j.Resilience4JConfigBuilder
     
    CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy - Class in org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry
    A stateful circuit breaker implementation modeled after Spring Retry's CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.
    CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy(RetryPolicy) - Constructor for class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy
    Create a new circuit breaker retry policy with default settings.

    Create a new circuit breaker retry policy.
    CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.State - Enum Class in org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry
    Circuit breaker state enumeration.
    CLOSED - Enum constant in enum class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.State
    Circuit is closed - requests pass through normally.

    H

    HALF_OPEN - Enum constant in enum class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.State
    Circuit is half-open - one test request is allowed through.

    OPEN - Enum constant in enum class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.State
    Circuit is open - requests fail immediately.
    openTimeout(Duration) - Method in class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
    Set the open timeout - how long the circuit stays open before transitioning to half-open.

    Record a failed execution.

    Record a successful execution.
    reset() - Method in class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy
    Reset the circuit breaker to its initial state.
    resetTimeout(Duration) - Method in class org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
    Set the reset timeout - how long to wait after a failure before resetting the circuit breaker state.
    Resilence4JMetricsOrderingAutoConfiguration - Class in org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.resilience4j
    Auto-configuration to ensure that TimeLimiterMetricsAutoConfiguration goes after CompositeMeterRegistryAutoConfiguration so that the MeterRegistry bean is available.
